response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The transcribed lyrics match the Reference JSON for '抗う君への鎮魂歌', with manual refinements for accuracy based on the audio. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the Reference JSON for the main performance, while translating on-screen silent text during the interlude/collage scene and manually transcribing the speech announcement at the end. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to the exact millisecond of vocal starts and extended cleanly to the end of vocal phrases. On-screen texts are subtitled to match their visual on-screen duration.

subtitles.original: 抗う君への鎮魂歌
subtitles.english: [Title: Requiem for the Resisting You]

subtitles.original: 正しさだけが纏える術があれば
subtitles.english: If there were a way to wear only righteousness,

subtitles.original: 少しは救われるだろうか
subtitles.english: would I be saved a little?

subtitles.original: その瞳へと問いかける
subtitles.english: I ask that into those eyes.

subtitles.original: 守るべきを捨てるべきと誰に騙かされても
subtitles.english: Even if someone misleads me on what to protect or discard,

subtitles.original: もう心通わないなら
subtitles.english: if our hearts no longer connect,

subtitles.original: それは虚偽だ
subtitles.english: then that is a falsehood.

subtitles.original: 何も捨てずに抗え
subtitles.english: Resist without discarding anything.

subtitles.original: 力なき身じゃ
subtitles.english: As someone powerless,

subtitles.original: その覚悟が奇跡を創り
subtitles.english: that resolve will create a miracle,

subtitles.original: ただしさは伴わない
subtitles.english: but righteousness will not accompany us.

subtitles.original: 失えば失うほどにさらに気高く
subtitles.english: The more you lose, the more noble you become.

subtitles.original: その意思で世界を怨め
subtitles.english: With that will, resent the world.

subtitles.original: 心が軋んで何度も引き裂かれようとも
subtitles.english: Even if my heart creaks and is torn apart many times,

subtitles.original: 抗え
subtitles.english: resist.

subtitles.original: かよわき一人を守り抜くための
subtitles.english: To protect that one frail person,

subtitles.original: この手のひらがどれだけ汚れてしまっても
subtitles.english: no matter how dirty these palms of mine become,

subtitles.original: 構わないさ
subtitles.english: I do not care,

subtitles.original: 君が笑うなら
subtitles.english: if you smile,

subtitles.original: 僕は何にでもなる
subtitles.english: I will become anything.

subtitles.original: 浅ましき期待 悦に浸るだけなら
subtitles.english: If it is only to indulge in miserable expectations and pleasure,

subtitles.original: 人も獣も何一つ変わらない
subtitles.english: both humans and beasts are not different at all.

subtitles.original: 鎖に似た自由を嘆いては保存
subtitles.english: Mourning over a freedom that resembles chains,

subtitles.original: 歪に愛を求めているのでしょう
subtitles.english: you must be seeking love in a distorted way.

subtitles.original: どうか君だけは
subtitles.english: Please, at least you,

subtitles.original: 僕を覚えていてほしい
subtitles.english: I want you to remember me.

subtitles.original: さあ 還らせ 君を
subtitles.english: Come, let me return you

subtitles.original: 自由へと誘う
subtitles.english: as I lead you to freedom.

subtitles.original: 俯けば俯くほどにさらに気高く
subtitles.english: The more you look down, the more noble you become.

subtitles.original: その意思で世界を揺らせ
subtitles.english: With that will, shake the world.

subtitles.original: 心が軋んで何もかもが崩れても
subtitles.english: Even if your heart creaks and everything crumbles,

subtitles.original: 抗え
subtitles.english: resist.

subtitles.original: かよわき一人を守り抜くための
subtitles.english: To protect that one frail person,

subtitles.original: この手のひらがどれだけ汚れてしまっても
subtitles.english: no matter how dirty these palms of mine become,

subtitles.original: 構わないさ
subtitles.english: I do not care,

subtitles.original: 君が笑うなら
subtitles.english: if you smile,

subtitles.original: 壊して見せる この牢獄から
subtitles.english: I will break you free from this prison.

subtitles.original: 君が笑えたとき
subtitles.english: When you are able to smile,

subtitles.original: 僕は報われるのだろう
subtitles.english: I will be saved.

subtitles.original: 消えかけた夢に
subtitles.english: [Text: In a fading dream,]

subtitles.original: バカにされても ボロボロだけど
subtitles.english: [Text: even if ridiculed, though in tatters...]

subtitles.original: Tori To Re:TreaT
subtitles.english: [Text: Tori To Re:TreaT]

subtitles.original: ZIGZAG
subtitles.english: [Text: ZIGZAG]

subtitles.original: 不安も、否定も、葛藤も。
subtitles.english: [Text: Anxiety, denial, and conflict.]

subtitles.original: 私が歌で「反逆」する。
subtitles.english: [Text: I will "rebel" through my song.]

subtitles.original: 1st Live 開催決定
subtitles.english: [Text: 1st Live Decided to be held]

subtitles.original: venue Kanadevia Hall
subtitles.english: [Text: Venue: Kanadevia Hall]

subtitles.original: REBELiON Takane Lui 1st Live
subtitles.english: [Text: REBELiON Takane Lui 1st Live]

subtitles.original: ここから始まる、私だけの物語。
subtitles.english: [Text: My story begins here.]

subtitles.original: はい、ということで！
subtitles.english: Alright, so!

subtitles.original: 私、鷹嶺ルイの初めてのソロライブが決定しました！
subtitles.english: My first solo live concert, Takane Lui 1st Live, has been officially decided!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！フゥー！
subtitles.english: Yay! Woo!

subtitles.original: 日程は半年後になる、なるのですが
subtitles.english: The date is in half a year, but...

subtitles.original: 半年後の2026年12月16日水曜日となっております！
subtitles.english: It will be on Wednesday, December 16th, 2026!
